mapper.select: select count(*) from tb_make_info where weigh_id = #{weighId}

select b.make_No ,a.item_cd ,dbo.getItemName(a.item_cd) as itemName ,a.proc_order_date ,a.order_qty ,(select storage_name from tb_storage_mst where storage_cd = a.storage_cd) as storage_name ,'['+a.work_equipment_Cd+']' + c.equipment_name as work_equipment_Cd ,a.prod_date ,a.storage_cd ,a.memo ,a.etc ,b.po_no ,a.end_yn ,(select CONCAT(CONVERT(varchar(10),work_order_date,23),' - ',seq) from TB_WORK_ORDER_MST where work_order_id = a.work_order_id ) as workOrderDateSeq ,a.proc_status ,b.batch_status ,a.work_proc_id ,a.work_batch_id ,a.work_order_id ,a.proc_cd ,(select area_cd from tb_work_order_mst where work_order_id = a.work_order_id) as area_cd ,b.lot_no ,b.lot_no2 ,(select client_id from TB_WORK_ORDER_MST where work_order_id = a.work_order_id) as client_id ,a.test_no from TB_WORK_ORDER_PROC a inner join TB_WORK_ORDER_BATCH b on b.work_batch_id = a.work_batch_id left outer join tb_equipment_mst c on c.equipment_cd = a.work_equipment_Cd where a.proc_cd = 'PRC002' and a.work_batch_id = #{workBatchId}

select a.phase ,a.item_cd ,dbo.getItemName(a.item_cd) as item_name ,a.order_qty ,a.make_qty ,a.make_time ,a.make_yn ,a.maker ,a.make_confirmer ,a.weigh_id ,a.work_proc_id ,a.work_batch_id from tb_weigh_info a where a.work_proc_id = #{workProcId}
select weigh_qty as weighQty from tb_weigh_info where weigh_id = #{weighId}
